notes: Source: docs/ghl-reference/dispobuddy/dispobuddy-tags.csv. Lowercase exactly — GHL stores tags lowercased anyway, but workflow filters are case-sensitive on the original spec.

tags.name: dispo-buddy
tags.purpose: Segments from TFS buyers in campaigns. Set on every Dispo Buddy form submission.

tags.name: jv-partner
tags.purpose: JV wholesale partner identity. Set on every Dispo Buddy form submission.

tags.name: jv-submitted
tags.purpose: Trigger for dispo-buddy-triage cron (DEFERRED). Applied on deal submission only.

tags.name: db-subto
tags.purpose: deal_type contains 'subto' or 'subject'. Also set for Hybrid and Morby.

tags.name: db-seller-finance
tags.purpose: deal_type contains 'seller finance'. Also set for Hybrid and Morby.

tags.name: db-affiliate-referred
tags.purpose: Came via affiliate link. affiliate_id field present.

tags.name: db-jv-with-wholesaler
tags.purpose: Contract path = JV agreement with another wholesaler.

tags.name: opt in
tags.purpose: Required gate before any marketing SMS/email (mirrors TFS opt-in rule).

tags.name: migrated:db
tags.purpose: One-shot tag during sub-account split. Identifies contacts moved from TFS to DB (rollback safety net).

rules: Tags are mutually-OR'd within each category — a deal can be db-cash AND db-subto if hybrid.
opt in is REQUIRED on a contact before any campaign SMS/email per CLAUDE.md global rule.
jv-submitted is the per-deal trigger; do not apply on partner-onboard (only on actual deal submission).
